Title: Gomen ne robotto-san Sabaku ni kieta namida.
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Kôzô Shioya, Jôji Yanami
Plot: Gohan is attacked by wild animals. As he attempts to escape, he falls into an underground cavern, where he finds a robot who teaches him to take care of himself. Meanwhile, Goku, who is still on Hebi no Michi, takes a break from r...
